name: zscaler-private-access
label: Zscaler Private Access (ZPA)
description: Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) is a cloud-delivered Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) solution that provides secure, identity-based access to internal applications without placing users on the network. It enables seamless integration with FortiSOAR for automated access control, threat response, and policy enforcement based on real-time user and application context. This connector enables automated operations such as Get All Configured Applications Segments, Get Specific Application Segment Details, Get Customer Certificates, Get All Issued Certificates, and Get Certificate Details.

fields.name: server_url
fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the host or server URL for Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) to access the Rest API endpoint.
fields.tooltip: Specify the host or server URL for Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) to access the Rest API endpoint.

fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: Specify the Client ID used for authenticating with the Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) API endpoint.
fields.tooltip: Specify the Client ID used for authenticating with the Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) API endpoint.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: Specify the Client Secret used for authenticating with the Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) API endpoint.
fields.tooltip: Specify the Client Secret used for authenticating with the Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) API endpoint.

fields.name: token_url
fields.title: ZIdentity's Auth Token Endpoint
fields.description: Specify the ZIdentity auth token endpoint. This endpoint generates the Bearer token.
fields.tooltip: Specify the ZIdentity auth token endpoint. This endpoint generates the Bearer token.

fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Get All Configured Applications Segments
operations.description: Gets all configured application segments for the specified customer.

parameters.title: Customer ID
parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Specify the unique identifier of the ZPA tenant.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique identifier of the ZPA tenant.

parameters.title: Filter String
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Specify the search term for filtering applications.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the search term for filtering applications.

parameters.name: page
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specifies the number of records to skip before starting to return results. Used for paginating API responses in combination with the Limit.
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the number of records to skip before starting to return results. Used for paginating API responses in combination with the Limit.

parameters.name: pagesize
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specifies the page size, i.e., the maximum number of records to return for this action. If not provided, the default page size is 20. The maximum page size is 500.
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the page size, i.e., the maximum number of records to return for this action. If not provided, the default page size is 20. The maximum page size is 500.

parameters.name: microtenantId
parameters.title: Micro Tenant ID
parameters.description: Specify the unique identifier of the Micro tenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within a Micro tenant, you must pass the micro tenantId field when making an API call to retrieve data from that Micro tenant.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique identifier of the Micro tenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within a Micro tenant, you must pass the micro tenantId field when making an API call to retrieve data from that Micro tenant.

operations.title: Get Specific Application Segment Details
operations.description: Retrieves the configuration details of the Application Segment associated with the given Application ID.

parameters.title: Customer ID
parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Specify the unique identifier of the ZPA tenant.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique identifier of the ZPA tenant.

parameters.title: Application ID
parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Specify the unique identifier of the Application Segment.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique identifier of the Application Segment.

parameters.name: micro_tenant_id
parameters.title: Micro Tenant ID
parameters.description: Specify the unique identifier of the Micro tenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within a Micro tenant, you must pass the micro tenantId field when making an API call to retrieve data from that Micro tenant.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique identifier of the Micro tenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within a Micro tenant, you must pass the micro tenantId field when making an API call to retrieve data from that Micro tenant.

operations.title: Get Customer Certificates
operations.description: Retrieves a list of all available customer certificates based on the provided Customer ID.

parameters.title: Customer ID
parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer.

parameters.title: Customer ID
parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer.

parameters.title: Filter String
parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Specify the search string for filtering the certificates. ex name LIKE client
parameters.tooltip: Specify the search string for filtering the certificates. ex name LIKE client

parameters.name: page
parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specifies the number of records to skip before starting to return results. Used for paginating API responses in combination with the Limit.
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the number of records to skip before starting to return results. Used for paginating API responses in combination with the Limit.

parameters.name: pagesize
parameters.title: Limit
parameters.description: Specifies the page size, i.e., the maximum number of records to return for this action. If not provided, the default page size is 20. The maximum page size is 500.
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the page size, i.e., the maximum number of records to return for this action. If not provided, the default page size is 20. The maximum page size is 500.

operations.title: Get Certificate Details
operations.description: Retrieves details of a specific certificate based on its ID.

parameters.title: Customer ID
parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer for whom the specific certificate is being returned.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the unique ZPA Tenant ID of the customer for whom the specific certificate is being returned.

parameters.title: Certificate ID
parameters.name: certificateId
parameters.description: Specify the ID of the certificate for which you want to retrieve details.
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ID of the certificate for which you want to retrieve details.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Execute any Zscaler Private Access (ZPA) API endpoint using the specified API method, endpoint, and payload as input parameters.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the REST API endpoint for the action to perform. Note: Do not include the host URL in the endpoint. ex /zpa/mgmtconfig/v1/admin/customers/{customerId}/policySet/policyType/{policyType} or /zpa/mgmtconfig/v1/admin/customers/{customerId}/application/{applicationId}.
parameters.description: Specify the REST API endpoint for the action to perform. Note: Do not include the host URL in the endpoint. ex /zpa/mgmtconfig/v1/admin/customers/{customerId}/policySet/policyType/{policyType} or /zpa/mgmtconfig/v1/admin/customers/{customerId}/application/{applicationId}.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.name: query_params
parameters.description: Specify the he Rest API query parameters object in JSON format.

parameters.title: Request Body/Payload
parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The payload needed for the call. Use empty brackets if there is no payload.
